reviews.comment:
Sólo paré para comprar agua e ir al baño. El lugar es triste, no dan ganas de volver. Los baños estaban sucios. Una lástima que una estación del ACA esté en ese estado. Le doy 3 estrellas porque me atendieron bien en el mercado.

(Translated by Google)
I only stopped to buy water and use the restroom. The place is sad; I don't feel like going back. The restrooms were filthy. It's a shame that an ACA station is in that condition. I'm giving it 3 stars because I received good service at the market.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMTRPMllnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para hacer una parada y seguir viaje, poco concurrido, baños limpios y si vas con perritos, mucho espacio verde para que descarguen energía y hagan sus necesidades.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop and continue your journey, not crowded, clean bathrooms and if you're traveling with dogs, plenty of green space for them to burn off energy and do their business.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMThxbnBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los servicios que ofrece son muy buenos , tiene buena atención en la playa y comercio ,
Lo mejor es la higiene de los baños y el espacio para pasar relajarse y descansar un tiempo antes de reanudar el viaje nuevamente

(Translated by Google)
The services offered are very good; the beach service and shops are excellent. The best thing is the cleanliness of the restrooms and the space to relax and unwind before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbDhET0hBEAE
